error.description:
Failed query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS rag_task_executions (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  trace_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  task_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  intent_id VARCHAR(255),
  status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'pending',
  rag_called VARCHAR(50),
  attempt INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
  query TEXT,
  response TEXT,
  error_message TEXT,
  sources JSONB,
  confidence FLOAT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  UNIQUE(trace_id, task_id)
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_task_status ON rag_task_executions(trace_id, status);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_task_attempt ON rag_task_executions(trace_id, task_id, attempt);
error.name: NodeOperationError

parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS rag_task_executions (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  trace_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  task_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  intent_id VARCHAR(255),
  status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'pending',
  rag_called VARCHAR(50),
  attempt INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
  query TEXT,
  response TEXT,
  error_message TEXT,
  sources JSONB,
  confidence FLOAT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  UNIQUE(trace_id, task_id)
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_task_status ON rag_task_executions(trace_id, status);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_task_attempt ON rag_task_executions(trace_id, task_id, attempt);
